description.value:
You're the child of a dead world or doomed civilization, a lost offshoot of humanity that perished due to invasion, natural disaster, or war. You've grown cautious and learned from your people's shattered past, determined to break destructive patterns and reclaim your place in the galaxy.

The circumstance bonus to initiative rolls you gain when you or an ally uses the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.Scout] exploration activity is +2 instead of +1. When you roll initiative, you can Stand or Step as a reaction.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feat-effects.Item.Effect: Scout (Cataclyst Human)]
